name.full: Async Daily Standup Bot with AI Summaries

description.short: Automated daily standup prompts, AI summaries, and team analytics
description.full: Standup Agent sends daily standup prompts to team members via Adaptive Cards, collects responses, synthesizes team summaries with Azure OpenAI, and posts them to configured channels. Supports multiple teams with independent schedules and timezones. Includes a Fabric analytics pipeline for blocker trend analysis and team health scoring.

commands.title: skip
commands.description: Mark yourself as OOO for today
